local_agency: NY Department of Taxation and Finance
description: Tax credit for working individuals and families. NYC residents can receive a triple credit: federal EITC + NY State EITC (30% of federal) + NYC Noncustodial Parent EITC.

eligibility.nyc_eitc_note: NYC Noncustodial Parent EITC is a separate, narrower credit (up to 5% of federal). NYC does not have a general EITC add-on.
eligibility.notes: Income limits and credit amounts are approximate for TY2025. Verify at IRS.gov. Investment income limit: ~$11,950.

apply_in_person: Claim on your federal and NY State tax return. Free filing at NYC Free Tax Prep sites.
how_to_apply: Claim the credit when filing your federal and NY State tax return. Use NYC Free Tax Prep for free filing assistance.
citation: IRC Section 32 (federal); NY Tax Law Section 606(d) (state); NYC Admin Code (city)
update_frequency: annual (IRS publishes thresholds in fall for next tax year)
